title: Refine Hero tagline text color and font style

requirements.text: Update the Hero section tagline styling to a more refined and visually distinct look: change the font to a bold, elegant serif style and adjust the text color to a warm, rich golden-amber shade that stands out clearly against the hero background — ensuring the result feels premium and professional.

quotes: Want to refine the shade or try a different style

acceptanceCriteria: The Hero tagline uses a refined, bold serif font (e.g., Fraunces at a heavier weight or a more prominent variant).
The tagline color is updated to a warm golden-amber tone that is noticeably richer or more saturated than the previous version.
The tagline remains clearly legible against the hero background image and gradient overlays.
No other text elements outside the tagline are unintentionally affected.

constraints: Do not change the backend schema or any backend logic.
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Only the Hero tagline styling should be changed — no other sections or components.
nonGoals: Changing any other section's typography or color palette.
Modifying the Navbar, Footer, or any product section styling.
